ARKASCENSION
HomeAbout
MechanicsRulebookLogsGalleryContributionsSourcesFiles

IAT 201 — Group Project

SFU 2026

Ark Ascension

~ THE OFFICIAL RULEBOOK ~

Table of Contents

  1. Game Setup
  2. Race Board Details
  3. Galactic Central Board
  4. Turn Sequence
  5. Winning Condition

I. Game Setup

Board Setup

  1. Place the Galactic Central Board in the center of the table.
  2. Place the Resource Pools (Metal, Fuel, Crystal) beside the board.
  3. Shuffle the three card decks and place them face-down:
    • Action Deck — Place in the "Event Zone"
    • Sabotage Deck — Place in the "Black Market Zone"
    • Solar Penalty Deck — Place in the "Solar Zone"
  4. Set the Solar Sacrifice Marker to "0" on the Cumulative Failure Track.

Player Setup

Each player chooses a Race Board and their Ship Miniature. All players receive 3 Metal, 3 Fuel, 2 Crystals plus racial bonuses:

RaceBonus
Turian+1 Metal
Asari+1 Crystal
Krogan+1 Metal
Salarian+1 Crystal
Human+1 Metal
  • Each player draws 2 Sabotage Cards as their starting hand.
  • All ships start at The Citadel (Tile 0).
  • Determine starting player by highest die roll.

II. Race Board Details

Each Race Board includes the faction name, Passive Ability, Active Ability (with cost), and the Ark Construction Track (10 slots).

Turian: The Hierarchy Fleet

Passive

Tactical Discipline — Movement fuel cost −1 (Min. 1 fuel per move action).

Active

Covering Fire — Spend 1 Fuel; gain +2 to your die roll this turn (movement or mining).

Ark Construction Track

  • ▸Slots 1–3: 2 Metal
  • ▸Slots 4–5: 2 Metal + 1 Fuel
  • ▸Slots 6–7: 2 Fuel
  • ▸Slots 8–9: 3 Metal
  • ▸Slot 10: 1 Metal + 2 Fuel + 3 Crystals

Asari: Guardians of Thessia

Passive

Biotic Resonance — When drawing an Action Card, draw 2 and keep 1; discard the other.

Active

Enthrall — Spend 1 Crystal; target an opponent to force a 1-for-1 resource swap.

Ark Construction Track

  • ▸Slots 1–3: 2 Crystals
  • ▸Slots 4–5: 2 Crystals + 1 Metal
  • ▸Slots 6–7: 2 Metal
  • ▸Slots 8–9: 3 Crystals
  • ▸Slot 10: 2 Crystals + 2 Fuel + 2 Metal

Krogan: Sons of Tuchanka

Passive

Blood Rage — Once per turn, spend 1 Fuel to negate a Sabotage Card played against you.

Active

Hardcore Charge — Spend 2 Fuel; move immediately to any unoccupied space on the board.

Ark Construction Track

  • ▸Slots 1–4: 3 Metal
  • ▸Slots 5–6: 2 Metal + 2 Fuel
  • ▸Slots 7–8: 4 Metal
  • ▸Slot 9: 3 Fuel
  • ▸Slot 10: 3 Metal + 3 Fuel + 3 Crystals

Salarian: STG Tech

Passive

Research Acceleration — Gain 1 Crystal automatically at the start of your turn.

Active

Intel Analysis — Spend 1 Crystal; look at the top 3 cards of the Sabotage Deck. Reorder or draw 1.

Ark Construction Track

  • ▸Slots 1–3: 2 Crystals
  • ▸Slots 4–5: 1 Crystal + 2 Metal
  • ▸Slots 6–7: 2 Fuel
  • ▸Slots 8–9: 3 Crystals
  • ▸Slot 10: 4 Crystals + 2 Metal + 2 Fuel

Human: Alliance Ark Program

Passive

Indomitable — During Solar Sacrifice, if the goal is failed, any penalty you personally receive is halved (rounded up).

Active

Alliance Will — Spend 1 resource of any type; your trades this turn cannot be sabotaged.

Ark Construction Track

  • ▸Slots 1–6: Alternating 2 Metal, 2 Fuel, or 2 Crystals
  • ▸Slots 7–9: Mixed resource pairs
  • ▸Slot 10: 2 Metal + 2 Fuel + 2 Crystals

III. Galactic Central Board

The board consists of 20 tiles arranged in a circular loop.

Tile #NameTypeEffect
0CitadelStart / SafeNo effect on stop; pass through to repair (discard 1 Sabotage card).
1, 11, 16Asteroid / Colony / FortressMetal MineRoll die to mine Metal (Tile 16 gives 2× bonus).
2, 10Mass RelaySpecialSpend 1 Fuel to warp to any other Mass Relay tile.
3, 9, 14Illium / Ruins / TempleCrystal MineRoll die to mine Crystals (Tile 14 gives 2× bonus).
4Omega StationBlack MarketDraw 1 Sabotage card for free or buy 1 for 1 Crystal.
5, 7, 12, 17Hazard ZonesDangerDraw 1 Action Card immediately.
6, 18Wreck / LabFuel DepotRoll die to collect Fuel (Tile 18 gives 2× bonus).
8Citadel CouncilTradingForce a trade with any player; both roll, winner sets terms.
15Solar ObservatorySpecialPeek at the top Solar Penalty card; choose whether to trigger it now.
19Ark DrydockFinish / SafeStop here to build 1 Ark Slot for free (Limit: once per game).

IV. Turn Sequence

0

Start of Turn

Salarians gain 1 Crystal automatically.

1

Solar Sacrifice

Active player rolls 2 dice for the "Sacrifice Value." All players contribute resources to the pool. If total < Value, trigger a Solar Penalty and advance the failure track. 3 failures = Game Over for everyone.

2

Movement

Spend 1 Fuel. Roll 1 die. Move clockwise. If landing on a space with another player, pay them 1 resource or draw an Action card.

3

Tile Resolution

Execute the effect of the space landed upon (Mining, Danger Zone, Special, Black Market, etc.).

4

Action Phase

Choose up to one of each: Use 1 Race Ability · Play 1 Sabotage Card · Trade with others · Build Ark (pay resources to fill slots in order).

5

End of Turn

Check hand limit (7 cards max) and pass play to the left.

V. Winning Condition

Fill All 10 Ark Slots

The first player to fill all 10 Ark Slots on their Race Board wins the game and saves their species from the supernova.

2–5 players
60–90 min play time
3 failures = collective loss
